reason: strcpy() does not perform bounds checking and will copy src to dest regardless of dest buffer size, potentially writing beyond allocated memory
attack_vector: Attacker can provide a src string longer than dest buffer capacity to overflow dest and potentially overwrite adjacent memory, leading to code execution or data corruption

reason: No null pointer validation for dest parameter before dereferencing
attack_vector: Attacker can pass NULL as dest parameter causing segmentation fault and potential denial of service

reason: No null pointer validation for src parameter before dereferencing
attack_vector: Attacker can pass NULL as src parameter causing segmentation fault and potential denial of service
